question: Walter's soccer team lost the game because they did not play ___ enough.
Tom is very bright for his age. He is able to do math problems of some ___ although his classmates are still learning the basics.
Annual floods along the Nile River make the soil there extremely ___.
The children could not ___ opening their presents on Christmas morning.
A man was arrested at the airport yesterday for attempting to ___ drugs into the country.
Soon after they met, the young couple became ___ their free time together.
Although the medicine did not completely relieve Frank's headache, it made the pain more ___.
The man was in ___ that his marriage was over.
The walls inside the city hall building are decorated with ___ painted by famous artists.
The Ferris wheel began to ___ slowly, lifting the carriages and their passengers high above the city and then down again.
Yesterday, a ___ broke out in the state prison.
Brad drove so carelessly that it was ___ he would have an accident.
Although her son claims he broke the vase by accident, Anika thinks he did it ___ because he was angry at her for making him clean his room.
Many residents wanted to ___ the town hall as a historic building since it was over one hundred years old.
As soon as they heard police sirens, the thieves ___ into the woods to avoid being caught.
The Nelsons tried to sell their house earlier this year, but few people were interested in buying it. They have decided to ___ until the market improves.
Emergency services were having difficulty getting to the scene of the accident, so the police ___ traffic to another road to make space for ambulances and fire trucks.
The teacher suddenly lost his temper and shouted at the class to be quiet. Following his ___, all the students in the classroom went silent.
That's odd. She usually gives such ___ replies.
Researchers at the drug company have improved the ___ of their headache medicine.
Using a smartphone while driving is now illegal in many places because it ___ drivers, who should always be watching the road.
In an effort to reduce government spending, the government has ___ the post office by allowing a for-profit corporation to take it over.
Most of the topics discussed in the weekly meeting are ___ to his section.
After a storm, flooding can make roads ___.
Although the company faced strong competition, its innovative products gave it a ___ advantage in the market.
To ensure the safety of all passengers, the airline has implemented ___ security measures at all airports.
The museum curator asked the visitors to not ___ the ancient artifacts on display to preserve them for future generations.
The experienced detective had a strong ___ that the witness was not telling the whole truth about the incident.
The government implemented a series of ___ reforms to address the widespread corruption within the public sector.
The sudden increase in the price of oil caused ___ across the country, leading to protests and demands for government intervention.
After years of hard work and dedication, the scientist celebrated her ___ with colleagues and family.
A: Could you please ___ my apologies to Mr. Smith for missing our appointment?
A: What is that unpleasant ___ coming from the kitchen?
The city center was ___ decorated with colorful lights and banners for the annual festival.
The chef created a ___ dish that combined traditional Japanese ingredients with French cooking techniques.
The sailor carefully tied a secure ___ to fasten the boat to the pier.
There was a ___ silence in the courtroom as the judge read out the verdict.
In order to explore the narrow passage, the spelunker had to ___ on his stomach through the tight space.
A: I can’t believe they decided to ___ the old library.
Many students find it challenging to ___ the high expectations of their parents and teachers.
Despite the complexity of the mathematical problem, she was able to ___ it with relative ease.
The comedian used witty jokes and engaging stories to ___ the audience at the beginning of his performance.
